title: cynanchica pyrenaica subsp. neglecta
intro: Cynanchica pyrenaica subsp. neglecta, also known as the Pyrenean swallow-wort, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Cynanchica pyrenaica subsp. neglecta include alleviating symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as providing relief from pain and swelling. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
